name: crack-system-interview-skill
description: System design interview prep skills: diagram-first Excalidraw cards, senior SDE talk tracks, and a 14-week study coach.

interface.shortDescription: Whiteboard cards and a 14-week study coach.
interface.longDescription: Prepare for system design interviews with diagram-first Excalidraw visuals, senior SDE talk tracks, and a bundled 14-week study coach. Use $card for technical notes, $senior-sde-interview-script for interview-ready answers, and $system-design-study-coach for daily assignments and repair tasks.
defaultPrompt: Use $card to turn this text into a diagram-first Excalidraw visual and link only.
